metadata.title: What A Service — Freshworks Consultant | Freshservice & Freshdesk
metadata.description: Implementation, optimization and migration of Freshservice & Freshdesk for mid-market companies. ITIL 4, PRINCE2, Scrum certified. Results in weeks, not months.

hero.headline: Freshservice & Freshdesk, Configured Right the First Time
hero.subheadline: ITIL 4 · PRINCE2 · Scrum certified consultant for mid-market companies. Implementation, migration and optimization of Freshworks. Measurable results in weeks, not months.

cards.title: Your IT team is firefighting
cards.description: Freshservice adoption at 30%. Tickets falling through the cracks. The investment isn't translating into ROI.

cards.title: Your ITSM tool is holding you back
cards.description: Too complex, too expensive, too little adoption. No automation, breached SLAs, an overwhelmed team.

cards.title: Migration feels risky
cards.description: Your current tool costs too much but switching without losing data or disrupting operations is scary.

cards.title: Your processes don't scale
cards.description: Onboarding, offboarding and internal requests still rely on emails and Excel spreadsheets.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: Free audit of your IT environment. Identify quick wins and Freshworks improvement potential.

steps.title: Implement
steps.description: Tailored configuration, data migration, team training. Go-live in 4 weeks.

steps.title: Optimize
steps.description: Continuous improvement, advanced automations, KPI tracking. Your ROI grows every month.

cards.title: Freshservice
cards.subtitle: ITSM & ESM
cards.description: IT and business service management. Incidents, requests, changes, CMDB, self-service portal.

cards.title: Freshdesk
cards.subtitle: Customer support
cards.description: Omnichannel customer support. Tickets, chat, knowledge base, automations.

cards.title: Freddy AI
cards.subtitle: Artificial intelligence
cards.description: Intelligent automation. Chatbot, agent suggestions, predictive analytics, ticket deflection.

services.headline: 5 pillars to transform your IT
services.subheadline: Each fixed-fee package is designed to deliver measurable value. Results in weeks, not months.

cards.title: Implementation & Launch
cards.description: End-to-end Freshservice or Freshdesk deployment. Configuration, workflows, self-service portal, training.

cards.title: Migration
cards.description: Migration from ServiceNow, Jira, Zendesk or any other tool to Freshworks with zero data loss.

cards.title: Optimization
cards.description: Audit of your existing instance. Improve adoption, processes and ROI.

cards.title: ESM — Business Teams
cards.description: Extend Freshservice to HR, Finance, Legal. Onboarding, offboarding, internal requests.

cards.title: AI & Automation
cards.description: Freddy AI Agent, Copilot and Insights. Smart chatbot, agent suggestions, predictive analytics.

cases.challenge: Freshservice adoption at 30%, frustrated teams, invisible ROI.
cases.solution: Full audit, workflow redesign, targeted training, self-service portal.

cases.challenge: Migration from a legacy tool. Fear of data loss and change resistance.
cases.solution: Progressive migration, parallel training, data validation at each step.

testimonials.quote: Eric transformed how we work with Freshservice. In 4 weeks, our teams adopted it naturally.
testimonials.author: Sophie M.

testimonials.quote: The migration went smoothly. Not a single piece of data lost, and the team was autonomous from day 1.
testimonials.author: Marc D.

about.headline: The expert who makes the difference
about.name: Eric Sib
about.bio: ITSM consultant with over 10 years of experience in IT service digital transformation. Specialized in Freshworks, I combine technical expertise with a pragmatic approach to deliver real results, in weeks rather than months.
